## TRiSM Pull Request Gate

### Change Summary
- Deployment or artifact change:
- Business context:
- Affected environment:

### Control Objective
- Which control objectives are impacted?
- Control IDs (from control matrix):

### Risk Impact Statement
- New risks introduced:
- Existing risks changed:
- Residual risk summary:

### Required Evidence (attach links)
- [ ] Threat model updated
- [ ] Risk register updated
- [ ] Model assurance evidence attached
- [ ] Security/privacy evidence attached
- [ ] Gate checklist completed

### Deployment Gate Decision Request
- [ ] Gate 1: Design Assurance
- [ ] Gate 2: Pre-Production Assurance
- [ ] Gate 3: Go-Live Assurance
- [ ] Gate 4: Post-Live Assurance

### Reviewer Sign-Off
- [ ] AI Governance Lead
- [ ] Security Lead
- [ ] Privacy Lead
- [ ] Model Risk Lead
- [ ] Platform Engineering Lead

### Exception Handling
- [ ] No exceptions requested
- [ ] Exception requested and logged in decision register
Exception ID:

### Validation
- [ ] I confirm this PR includes all required governance evidence.
